mapper.sql: id, model_name, algorithm_id, training_id, version, model_format, model_size, model_path, accuracy, status, description, download_count, deploy_count, publish_time, created_by, created_time, updated_time, deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM algorithm_model WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC

SELECT
FROM algorithm_model WHERE algorithm_id = #{algorithmId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC

SELECT
FROM algorithm_model WHERE training_id = #{trainingId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC

SELECT
FROM algorithm_model WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE algorithm_model SET status = #{status}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE algorithm_model SET download_count = download_count + 1, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE algorithm_model SET deploy_count = deploy_count + 1, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'draft' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as draftCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'testing' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as testingCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'published' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as publishedCount, SUM(download_count) as totalDownloadCount, SUM(deploy_count) as totalDeployCount FROM algorithm_model WHERE deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM algorithm_model WHERE algorithm_id = #{algorithmId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM algorithm_model WHERE created_by = #{createdBy} AND deleted = 0

SELECT SUM(CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(model_size, 'MB', ''), 'GB', '000'), 'KB', '0.001') AS DECIMAL(10,3))) * 1024 * 1024 FROM algorithm_model WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'published' AND model_size IS NOT NULL
